'''Vogel 7''' was a low-[[Gravity/Legends|gravity]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Vogel system/Legends|Vogel system]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].

==History==
It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Cecius]] and [[Ranulf Trommer/Legends|Ranulf Trommer]]. The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] was home to a branch of the [[Imperial Academy/Legends|Imperial Academy]] where [[Atton Repness]] trained. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] base on the planet was captured by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. [[Ranulf Trommer/Legends|Ranulf Trommer]] grew up in the [[Naval Academy (Vogel 7)|Naval Academy]] on Vogel 7.

==Appearances==
*[[River of Chaos 1|''River of Chaos'' 1]] {{1stm}}
